name: grokodex
description: Grok agent & tools for coding agents — local Grok, Imagine, and X search via MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Grok agent & tools for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Run local Grok as a second agent from your coding agent (Codex, Claude Code, and other MCP hosts). Supports restricted-by-default delegation, optional permission inherit, Imagine image generation, and X search.
defaultPrompt: Use Grokodex to have Grok review this change
Use Grokodex Imagine to generate an app icon concept
Use Grokodex to search X for recent discussion of this library
